commands.name: list
commands.description: List packages from a v3 source.

options.name: --start
options.description:
Beginning of the commit time range. Packages commited AFTER this
time will be included.

options.name: --end
options.description:
End of the commit time range. Packages commited at this time
will be included.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Write out additional network call information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: nupkgs
commands.description:
Mirror nupkgs to a folder.
Run 'NuGetMirror [command] -h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for nupkgs.

options.name: --folder-format
options.description: Output folder format. Defaults to v3. Options: (v2|v3)

options.name: --ignore-errors
options.description: Continue on errors.

options.name: --delay
options.description:
Avoid downloading the very latest packages on the feed to
avoid errors. This value is in minutes. Default: 10

options.name: --max-threads
options.description: Maximum number of concurrent downloads. Default: 8

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Output additional network information.

options.name: --include-id
options.description:
Include only these package ids or wildcards. May be
provided multiple times.

options.name: --exclude-id
options.description:
Exclude these package ids or wildcards. May be provided
multiple times.

options.name: --additional-output
options.description:
Additional output directory for nupkgs. The output path
with the most free space will be used.

options.name: --latest-only
options.description:
Include only the latest version of that package in the
result

options.name: --stable-only
options.description:
Include only stable versions of that package in the
result

options.name: --start
options.description:
Beginning of the commit time range. Packages commited
AFTER this time will be included. (The cursor value will
not be used with this option.)

options.name: --end
options.description:
End of the commit time range. Packages commited at this
time will be included.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

arguments.name: ROOT
arguments.description:
V3 feed index.json URI or a locally configured source
name

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information.
